title: How to Use Claude Cowork (Step-by-Step) | AI Agent on Your Computer
summary: Claude Cowork is a desktop AI agent that runs on Mac and Windows computers and enables users to automate daily tasks by interacting with files, emails, calendars, and other applications. The tool supports workflows for organizing files, connecting email and calendar services, and scheduling recurring tasks. Claude Cowork is available only to Claude Pro and Max plan subscribers.
